name: Noodles with Vegetable and Curry Sauce (Gueyt2
recipeIngredient: 4 oz Fresh white sen yai noodles
1 small Bundle long beans - chopped into 1-inch lengths
recipeInstructions:
This dish is a specialty of Narinthi and Warochun at their restaurant The Lemon Grass, Sukhumvit Soi 24, Bangkok.
1. Blanch the noodles in boiling water until al dente; rinse and set aside.
2. Blanch the beansprouts, long beans, and broccoli stems in boiling water for 30 seconds each, then drain and arrange on a serving dish.
3. In a saucepan, gently heat the coconut milk over low heat, stirring in the red curry paste until fully blended. Add the remaining ingredients (curry powder, sugar, tamarind juice, crushed peanuts, and shallot), and stir to combine.
4. Pour the sauce over the noodles and vegetables, or serve the sauce separately for individual serving.
5. Garnish with crispy, deep-fried potato rounds.
